directive_driven.summary: Oldest open issue ISS-708 (29.5d as of 2026-05-10T06UTC, severity=minor) crosses 30-day OBE threshold tomorrow (2026-05-11). PROP-026 Phase 1 (M2) won't close it because ISS-708 fails the false-positive guard ('When pipeline supports' substring). Operator-side action recommended: route ISS-708 manually to pending-human BEFORE Phase 1 deploys, OR accept the 30d crossover as a one-time data point until M1 (Phase 2) catches it.

directive_driven.summary: 27 open issues lack found_at/found_date fields entirely. Affects M1's age-based sweep — these items can't be aged, so M1 must escalate them via 'unknown — manual review required' rather than auto-action. Examples: ISS-1245, ISS-1246, ISS-1043. Schema cleanup deferred to a separate PROP per PROP-026's out_of_scope section.
